scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,database,storage,social,web,api,worker -c blue,cyan,white,gray,green,magenta,yellow "pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/database dev" "pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/storage dev" "pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/social dev" "pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/web dev" "pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/api start:dev" "pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/worker dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/shared build && pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/database build && pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/storage build && pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/social build && pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/web build && pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/api build && pnpm --filter @viral-clip-app/worker build
